sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2861" key="a)ka/kistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκάκιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not violent, gentle</tr_>, of remedies, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
